hero.title: One URL. Autonomous Trading.
hero.subtitle: Paste one URL into OpenClaw. The AI installs the plugin, creates wallets, bridges funds, and starts trading — all by itself.

quickstart.title: Paste This URL into OpenClaw
quickstart.description: You already have OpenClaw running. Just paste this URL into the chat. The AI reads the bundle, installs the plugin, bootstraps wallets, and starts executing trades.
quickstart.label: Paste into OpenClaw chat:
quickstart.result: That's it. OpenClaw reads the bundle, runs `openclaw plugin install openclaw-plugin-a2ex`, calls `a2ex.bootstrap`, creates your wallets, and starts trading — fully autonomous from this one URL.

trading.title: Autonomous Trading
trading.description: AI executes trades on Polymarket, Hyperliquid, and more — 24/7, without human intervention.

security.title: Non-Custodial Security
security.description: 2-wallet model (Vault + Hot) with MPC signing. Your keys never leave your machine.

multichain.title: Multi-Chain
multichain.description: Arbitrum, Polygon, and cross-chain bridges. One agent handles multiple networks seamlessly.

simple.title: Zero Config
simple.description: No setup files. No API keys to manage. Paste the bundle URL — the AI figures out the rest.

howItWorks.title: What Happens When You Paste the URL

steps.title: AI reads the bundle
steps.description: OpenClaw fetches the bundle JSON and sees it needs the a2ex plugin + strategy parameters.

steps.title: Plugin installs and bootstraps
steps.description: AI runs `openclaw plugin install openclaw-plugin-a2ex`, then calls `a2ex.bootstrap` — wallets, sessions, and policies are created automatically.

steps.title: You fund the vault
steps.description: AI shows your vault address. Send USDC + ETH on Arbitrum. AI polls until funded.

steps.title: Trades execute
steps.description: AI bridges funds, places orders on Polymarket/Hyperliquid, and manages positions — all autonomous.

architecture.title: Under the Hood
architecture.description: a2ex runs as an OpenClaw plugin. When you paste the bundle URL, three programs spin up inside your OpenClaw container.

footer.tagline: Built by Iotrust. An OpenClaw plugin for the agentic trading era.

docs.title: Getting Started with a2ex
docs.subtitle: Already running OpenClaw? You're one URL away from autonomous trading.

prerequisites.title: What You Need
prerequisites.openclaw: OpenClaw running (any version with plugin support)
prerequisites.note: That's it. No API keys, no config files, no Docker knowledge needed.

quick.title: The Quick Way (One URL)
quick.description: Open your OpenClaw chat and paste:
quick.note: OpenClaw reads the bundle, installs the plugin, bootstraps wallets, asks you to fund, and starts trading. You can intervene or ask questions at any time.

step1.title: Step 1: AI Installs the Plugin
step1.description: OpenClaw reads the bundle and automatically runs:
step1.note: The plugin registers a service and a per-turn tool factory with 22+ trading tools.

step2.title: Step 2: Bootstrap (Automatic)
step2.description: AI calls a2ex.bootstrap — WAIaaS spawns, wallets and sessions are created.
step2.note: Creates a Vault wallet (cold, approval-based) and a Hot wallet (instant, $50 limit). Master password is used once and not stored.
step2.warning: Save your master password. It's the only way to recover your wallets.

step3.title: Step 3: Fund Your Vault
step3.description: AI shows your vault address. Send USDC and ETH on Arbitrum.
step3.prompt: Send USDC 15 + ETH 0.005 to the vault address shown by the AI
step3.note: AI polls your balance and proceeds automatically once funded.

step4.title: Step 4: Trading Begins
step4.description: AI loads the strategy from the bundle, bridges funds, and executes trades.
step4.prompt: Fully autonomous — AI handles bridging, approvals, and order execution
step4.note: Monitor anytime with: a2ex.system_health. Stop anytime with: a2ex.runtime.stop

limitations.title: Known Limitations (Early Access)
items: WAIaaS session may expire after extended idle — AI auto-recovers
